title: AI Network Health Checker
description: Parses router outputs such as show bgp summary, show processes cpu, and interface status to detect BGP issues, high CPU, CRC errors, and down interfaces.
outcome: Built a mini NOC-style automation workflow for health reporting.
details: This project reads CLI-style router outputs and checks for BGP Active state, high CPU utilization, CRC errors, and down interfaces. It uses Python basics such as split(), strip(), loops, and conditions to build a practical monitoring script for network engineers.

title: Router Output File Analyzer
description: Reads saved router output files such as bgp.txt, cpu.txt, and interface.txt, then generates a consolidated health summary automatically.
outcome: Converted manual CLI review into repeatable automation.
details: This project moves from hardcoded router output to real text files. It reads multiple files, parses them independently, and combines the results into one health report. This is a strong foundation for later building AI-assisted NOC tools.

title: AI Roadmap for Network Engineers
description: Visual project showing the evolution from Networking → Automation → Data → AI → Intelligent Networks for modern engineers.
outcome: Used for personal branding and thought leadership posts.
details: This project communicates the future path for network engineers by showing a practical progression from networking fundamentals to AI-enabled operations.
